summary: Comprehensive SEO overhaul verification via code review and navigation testing. Verified 15 key public pages have all required SEO elements: absolute canonical URLs, meta robots 'index, follow', BreadcrumbList JSON-LD, Organization JSON-LD, and Service JSON-LD (for service pages). Found and fixed 1 issue: Blog.jsx had relative canonical URL - updated to absolute URL and added meta robots tag.

seo_issues_fixed.issue: BlogPost component had relative canonical URL (href={`/resources/blog/${post.slug}`}) instead of absolute
seo_issues_fixed.fix: Changed to href={`https://merchantsolutionscorp.com/resources/blog/${post.slug}`} and added meta robots tag

pages_verified: /ecommerce-payments - All SEO elements + Service + FAQPage schemas
/food-trucks-pos - All SEO elements + Service + FAQPage schemas
/industries/healthcare - All SEO elements + Service + FAQPage schemas

critical_code_review_comments: SEO implementation is comprehensive across all 15 key pages tested
All canonical URLs use absolute format (https://merchantsolutionscorp.com/...)
JSON-LD schemas correctly implemented: BreadcrumbList, Organization on all pages; Service on service/product pages; FAQPage on pages with FAQ sections

Note: Playwright SEO detection failed due to Emergent preview environment using iframe wrappers - react-helmet-async elements are injected client-side and not visible through iframe boundary. Code review confirms SEO elements are correctly implemented in source.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (15/15 pages passed navigation + code review verification)

context_for_next_testing_agent: SEO overhaul verified via code review. Key validation: All 15 target pages have absolute canonical URLs containing 'merchantsolutionscorp.com', meta robots 'index, follow', BreadcrumbList and Organization JSON-LD schemas. Service pages additionally have Service JSON-LD schema. FAQ pages have FAQPage JSON-LD schema. Fixed Blog.jsx which had relative canonical - now uses absolute URL. Note: Playwright cannot detect SEO elements in preview environment due to iframe wrapping of React app.
